etymology.description: The word 淮海 (Huái-Hǎi) refers to the Huai-Hai region, a historical and geographical area in China.
etymology.interpretation: 淮(淮) (huái, "Huai River") refers specifically to the Huai River, which is a significant geographical landmark in central China. 海(海) (hǎi, "sea; large water body") often denotes a vast water expanse. Together, 淮海 (Huái-Hǎi) designates an area defined by proximity to the Huai River and to maritime influences, emphasizing both inland and coastal geographical features.

examples.chinese: 淮海是一个历史悠久的地区(淮海是一個歷史悠久的地區)。
examples.pinyin: Huái-Hǎi shì yī gè lìshǐ yōujiǔ de dìqū.
examples.english: Huai-Hai is a region with a long history.

examples.chinese: 淮海地区的文化丰富多彩(淮海地區的文化豐富多彩)。
examples.pinyin: Huái-Hǎi dìqū de wénhuà fēngfù duōcǎi.
examples.english: The culture of the Huai-Hai region is rich and diverse.

examples.chinese: 许多人喜欢去淮海旅游(許多人喜歡去淮海旅遊)。
examples.pinyin: Xǔduō rén xǐhuān qù Huái-Hǎi lǚyóu.
examples.english: Many people enjoy traveling to the Huai-Hai region.
